title: Client Backpack
description:
THIS MOD DOES NOT ADD ANY FUNCTIONAL BACKPACKS, ONLY VISUAL IN CLIENT-SIDE.
A cosmetic mod that adds dynamic visual backpacks; Replaces existing backpack model from other backpack mods.
body:
--- #### ⚠️ ATTENTION: THIS MOD DOES NOT ADD ANY FUNCTIONAL BACKPACKS, ONLY VISUAL IN CLIENT-SIDE ## 📖 Overview **Client Wearables** is a cosmetic mod that adds dynamic visual backpacks; Replaces existing backpack model from other backpack mods. This mod is purely **client-side** and does **not** require a server-side installation. ## ✨ Features - **Replace backpack model** from other backpack mod like: sophisticate backpacks, travelers backpacks, inmis backpacks. - **Dynamic Appearance:** Models and visuals are changed on player's inventory content. - **Only require in Client-side** - Works in **single-player** and **multiplayer**. - Does **not** affect gameplay mechanics, ensuring a fair experience. ## ⛓️‍💥 Compatibility The mod is designed to be compatible with other mods. If you encounter any issues, please report them on the mod's issues tracker. Current backpack mod that supported: - Traveler's Backpack - Inmis - Sophisticated Backpacks - Sophisticated Backpacks (Unoffical Fabric port) ### 🖼️ Screenshots
Click here to see more
## ⚠️ Warning - For **fair play**, cosmetic content from other players is only visible if the server also has the mod installed. ## ⚙️ Config Config file location: config/client_backpack.toml ## 📌 Required mods - Faewulf's Lib - Fabric API (for Fabric loader only) - LambDynamicLights (Optional, for dynamic light support) ## 👍 Support For support, feature requests, or bug reports, please visit the mod's GitHub issues page. or join my Discord server: [link](https://faewulf.xyz/discord) ## 📃 License You can use this mod in your modpack as long as giving proper credits.
